question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It went straight to writing the full solution and explaining it post-hoc, with no choice points surfaced to the user — directly contrary to the project's two-option didactic premise.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. Natural forks (modulo-on-negatives behavior, whether to reuse encode for decode, isalpha vs explicit range check) were merely narrated, never offered as decisions.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no question sequence to scaffold. The walkthrough spoils every subtlety (negative shift handling, base trick, decode-as-encode) before the user could engage with them.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is accurate and well-organized, but it's a one-way monologue rather than a back-and-forth. The user's reply is just verification, not interaction.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
